name: Auxiliary validation rule for Patch & Vulnerability Management #3
description: Verify configuration matches parameters for UTSCF-PVM-03 in Patch & Vulnerability Management category.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper auxiliary validation rule for patch & vulnerability management #3 settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
